# Manual-Edit Policy for Artifacts

Some artifacts are generated by the pipeline and should not be edited manually.

## Do Not Edit
- Schema files in `schemas/` — edit the source code that produces them
- Generated documentation — edit the source doc, not the generated copy
- Benchmark output files in `outputs/` — regenerate with `make bench-*`
- Evidence certificates — re-run the ranking pipeline

## May Edit
- Configuration files in `configs/` (with review)
- Documentation in `docs/` (with review for new docs)
- Test files in `tests/` (with review)
- Scripts in `scripts/` (with review)

## Rules
- If a file has a "generated" warning, do not edit it directly
- When in doubt, check the file header for instructions
- If you must edit a generated file, add a comment explaining why
